title: cavanilla angulata
intro: Cavanilla angulata, also known as Vanilla planifolia, is a type of orchid plant native to Mexico and Central America, known for its edible and fragrant seed pods. The medicinal properties of Cavanilla angulata include its ability to act as an antimicrobial agent and an anti-inflammatory, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce pain. The health benefits of consuming Cavanilla angulata include its potential to aid in weight loss, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of Cavanilla angulata include dried seed pods, which can be used to make teas, infusions, and flavorings for desserts.
